{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113363449B32C33A5735BD77169"}"},"total":1536},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7515328048588882750","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺不错的，文笔剧情都是上乘，写恐怖也确实有恐怖的感觉，不过作者似乎喜欢创造一些独属于读者的暗示，例如第一个副本当中女同学怪异的肤色，然而她却是在中途变成鬼的，第二个副本当中狗狗被猫划伤脸，反派就是猫，主角却完全没在意。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749812185,"group_id":"7474905254878776345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Uz9d6IEeX8H2sG8/DLSidrgJzrbQTd0J4GBSI1DQEK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2751422314064756","user_name":"用户27514223"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2751422314064756","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7474905254878776345","book_info":{"abstract":"【精品真人有声剧已上线】【无限流+悬疑+烧脑+异能+灵异，无系统，不后宫，不无脑，介意者慎入】
当我一觉醒来，身边的一切变得诡异而惊悚。
死去的室友打来电话，在话筒里不断重复他垂死前的挣扎…
男生宿舍里，床上诡异出现纤细雪白的长腿…
本该躺在医院太平间里的尸体，在漆黑的夜晚再次敲响寝室房门...
挂满人皮的血腥密室...
喜欢用器官游戏虐杀参与者的黑猫...
还有来自特殊部门的神秘小队...
厉鬼索命，丧尸来袭，兽人横行，异能崛起…
人们迷失在诡梦的世界里，一步一步走向死亡。
而我，在生与死中找寻真相…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4f3315aca481370ac734ec1e9159aeb7","author":"七月妻","author_id":"","book_id":"7474905254878776345","book_name":"诡梦终焉！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#581008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7474905403906589208","read_count":"41021","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1364774"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"653","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,无限流,灵异,无后宫,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a261c1439f49f8399f4b85c42f1255d9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255395&x-signature=BP11LCiYlqv2JgDibHreFLGNZPE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3729127403","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113363449B32C33A5735BD77169"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17909, ,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":38155,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":22262},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1748011435,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7503941988581688126","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不管是文笔还是内容超级好看超级精彩！而且还是新型的诡异小说，看完三个副本最害怕的还是第一个，真的将现实带入进去了。每一座学校下面都是一座乱葬岗，残忍的凶杀案，消失的尸体，这些都不陌生，但是小说中连在了一起，再加上环境氛围渲染真的好恐怖。第一张就开大。
而且主角的身份真的好疑惑，目前所有章都看完了但，我还是觉得另有隐情。
顺带一提作者的另一本书我也看过，也是灵异类型的《鬼娘娘在上》这本也超级好看的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747150389,"group_id":"7474905254878776345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书荒看我，书架精品高评分，十日斩神戏神诡舍等，总有一本喜欢的，AJ148106395","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N05aFT6WaBYai6J5itwmzRilVWbZsTCZVKlvCwo6Y1k5","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78f55eb76a974a43a598d89908f2d69f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618803&x-signature=36TnFu8N%2B%2B7rOUHPPklOM7pJtJM%3D","user_id":"3180246196817796","user_name":"A阿玖J书荒看我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3180246196817796","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7474905254878776345","book_info":{"abstract":"【精品真人有声剧已上线】【无限流+悬疑+烧脑+异能+灵异，无系统，不后宫，不无脑，介意者慎入】
